title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. tinetense
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. tinetense, also known as Corsican rockrose, is a plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Helianthemum nummularium subsp. tinetense is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be applied to wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
